---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; gap:3rem; padding:2rem 0 2rem 0;">
  <div style="flex:1; max-width:600px;">
    <h1 style="font-size:3rem; font-weight:800; line-height:1.1; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0; color:var(--navy); letter-spacing:-0.02em;">Connor Conkey-Morrison</h1>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem; margin:0 0 1rem 0;">
      <span class="tag">PhD Candidate</span>
      <span class="tag">Provisional Psychologist</span>
      <span class="tag">Sessional Academic</span>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:1.05rem; color:var(--text-muted); line-height:1.75; margin:0 0 0 0;">I am a PhD candidate at RMIT University (School of Health and Biomedical Sciences). I also work as a provisional psychologist, and sessional academic at RMIT University and the Cairnmillar Institute.</p>
  </div>
  <div style="flex-shrink:0;">
    <img src="images/crop_27A5334.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Connor Conkey-Morrison">
  </div>
</div>
```

---

::: stats-strip
::: stat-item
**6**\
Papers in progress
:::

::: stat-item
**4**\
Peer-reviewed publications
:::

::: stat-item
**2024–2027**\
Active PhD period
:::

::: stat-item
**PROSPERO**\
Systematic review registered
:::
:::

::: about-section
## Current focus

I research school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) — why children disengage from school, what interventions work, and how disengagement develops across childhood and adolescence. My work combines systematic review methods, longitudinal cohort modelling, and population-level education data.

::: hero-links
[Research →](pages/research.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-primary} [Education & Experience →](pages/history.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary} [Get in touch →](pages/contact.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::
